rows.displayName: Drew Estate Liga Privada No. 9 Robusto / Toro / Corona Doble
rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper delivers dark chocolate, espresso, and fermented sweetness with oily richness.
rows.binderRole: Brazilian Mata Fina binder adds aromatic sweetness and savory depth distinctive to Liga blends.
rows.fillerRole: Honduran and Nicaraguan filler provide earth, subtle barnyard, cocoa, and private-blend density.
rows.flavorNotes: Dark chocolate, espresso, earth, leather, sweet tobacco, cedar, cocoa powder.
rows.bestFor: Celebration, bourbon pairing, private-blend fan, experienced smoker, after-dinner richness.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner, mild Connecticut preference, user dislikes earthy private-blend character.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants benchmark private-blend dark richness with Liga Privada pedigree.
rows.catalogLine: Drew Estate Liga Privada No. 9 Robusto · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark chocolate, espresso, earth, leather

rows.displayName: Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust Sin Compromiso No. 2 / No. 5 / Seleccion Maduro
rows.wrapperRole: San Andrés maduro wrapper contributes dark earth, cocoa, chicory, and savory sweetness.
rows.binderRole: Ecuador Habano binder adds structure, spice lift, and cohesion for the complex filler stack.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler provides body, loam, espresso undertones, and evolving savory depth.
rows.flavorNotes: Hot cocoa, leather, cream, earth, chicory, cedar, subtle sweetness, espresso.
rows.bestFor: Boutique enthusiast, cognac pairing, experienced smoker wanting layered savory-maduro without blunt force.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner, user wants mild Connecticut, or needs lowest price-point daily smoke.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend for no-compromise boutique balance—rich, savory, and nuanced rather than one-note strength.
rows.catalogLine: Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust Sin Compromiso No. 2 · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $15 · Notes: hot cocoa, leather, cream, earth
rows.sizeNote: Line also: No. 5, Seleccion — dimensions vary.

rows.displayName: Foundation Cigar Company The Tabernacle CT Broadleaf Robusto / Toro / Lancero
rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper brings fermented dark sweetness, cocoa, and dense oily texture.
rows.binderRole: Mexican San Andrés binder adds earthy sweetness and savory depth under the broadleaf.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan and Honduran filler supply body, spice, espresso, and a broad dark flavor core.
rows.flavorNotes: Dark cocoa, espresso, leather, earth, molasses, cedar, warming spice.
rows.bestFor: Boutique fan, special occasion, bourbon pairing, user wants broadleaf richness with construction pedigree.
rows.avoidIf: User wants mild cream, short smoke, low nicotine, or very simple Connecticut flavors.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants boutique broadleaf depth with strong identity and texture.
rows.catalogLine: Foundation Cigar Company The Tabernacle CT Broadleaf Robusto · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark cocoa, espresso, leather, earth
